name: Webhook Risk
description: Advisory mod that flags webhook safety signals across signature verification, replay protection, event schema handling, idempotency, and outbound side effects.
advises_on: Webhook safety signals across signature verification, replay protection, event schema handling, idempotency, and outbound side effects.
requirements: The neutral evidence stream (AdapterEmission) — no credentials, no live network.

ui.card_blurb: Surfaces webhook-safety signals; an advisory, never a gate.
